{{CargoRelic
|name=Well of Moses
|class_id=22437
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=08-06
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Aug 6, 1403 AD, the Well of Moses first appeared in a monastery.<br>The Well of Moses is not a well, but a sculpture created by the sculptor Claus Sluter. Its shape is similar to a hexagonal pedestal, with a statue of a prophet from the Bible on each of the six sides. The characters in the sculpture are presented in a highly realistic manner, not only in their form but also conveying different ideas and emotions. It is considered one of the best sculptures of the Dutch Renaissance.
|fame=24
|art=44
|fth=30
|civ=30
|tech=26
|ss1=Demon Minion DEF +1%
|ss2=Demon Minion DEF +2%
|ss3=Demon Minion DEF +3%
|ss4=Demon Minion DEF +5%
|ss7=Demon Minion DEF +5%<br>Demon Minion DEF +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Prairiesanctum skill I.png|50px]]Place in Prairie Sanctum: Prairie Sanctum, Glorium Output +5%
}}
